tspan.tspan: The object of the game is to remove three of your rings from the game.
The game starts with an empty board, and proceeds in two phases, placement
During the first phase the players take turns placing one of their rings on the board
any unoccupied space. Once both players have placed all 5 of their rings, this
phase is over. There are 51 double sided markers in total.
The second phase involves forming lines, defined as five adjacent markers in a
line with a single color. Once a line is formed in one player's color (on
removes the five markers, and also one of their
rings. Once a player has removed three of their
1. The player chooses one of their own rings to move.
2. The player places a marker, with their own color face-up, in the middle of that
3. The player then moves the ring to another unoccupied space, along a straight
from the originating node. The marker never moves.
• The moving ring may not move over other rings.
• The moving ring may pass over any number of markers in a row. If it does so, it
on the blank space immediately following the last marker moved over.
• All markers moved over like this are flipped over after moving the ring,
• A moving ring may not end on a space already occupied by a marker
• If a row has more than 5 markers, choose which 5 markers to remove - as long
